title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: tog-pegasus bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for tog-pegasus is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian

fixes.description: tog-pegasus unit file references a deprecated path
tog-pegasus fails to start when crypto policy is set to FUTURE

full_text:
An update for tog-pegasus is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.7 Release Notes linked from the References section.
